## Checklist

<!-- All boxes must be checked before requesting review -->

- [ ] I have read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] I have read [CODE_QUALITY.md](../CODE_QUALITY.md)
- [ ] I have read [STYLE_GUIDE.md](../STYLE_GUIDE.md)
- [ ] Solution compiles without warnings
- [ ] Solution is accepted on LeetCode (all test cases pass)
- [ ] Code follows naming conventions (no `tmp`, `d`, `flag`, etc.)
- [ ] No debug output, commented-out code, or TODOs
- [ ] File header (problem link, pattern, hints) is preserved
- [ ] Commit messages follow the format in CONTRIBUTING.md
- [ ] I have self-reviewed my diff
- [ ] This PR addresses a single problem only
